name: recycling_mrf
description: a recycling material-recovery-facility flow world; actions sort, bale, reject_contam

card.description: a recycling material-recovery-facility flow world; actions sort, bale, reject_contam

rules: 'sort' empties the infeed: contaminant units move to residue and the remaining clean units move to sorted.
'bale' compresses one bale_size of sorted material into a finished bale (only when at least bale_size units are staged).
'reject_contam' diverts all accumulated residue to rejected, clearing the residue holding.
Mass is conserved: every unit entering the infeed ends as a baled unit, staged in sorted, or rejected as residue.

transition.code:
def transition(state, action):
    s = dict(state)
    name = action["name"]

    if name == "sort":
        # Run the whole infeed batch across the sort line: the contaminant
        # fraction drops to residue, the rest is clean commodity for baling.
        feed = s["infeed"]
        if feed > 0:
            bad = min(s["contam"], feed)
            good = feed - bad
            s["sorted"] = s["sorted"] + good
            s["residue"] = s["residue"] + bad
            s["infeed"] = 0
            s["contam"] = 0

    elif name == "bale":
        # Compress one bale-worth of sorted material into a finished bale.
        size = s["bale_size"]
        if size > 0 and s["sorted"] >= size:
            s["sorted"] = s["sorted"] - size
            s["bales"] = s["bales"] + 1

    elif name == "reject_contam":
        # Ship the separated contamination out of the facility as residue.
        if s["residue"] > 0:
            s["rejected"] = s["rejected"] + s["residue"]
            s["residue"] = 0

    return s

emit.report: shipped {bales} bales; {sorted} staged, {residue} residue held, {rejected} rejected
